title: IIT Hyderabad – Post Doctoral Research Fellow – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Post-Doctoral Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Hyderabad Post-Doctoral Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 is now open for 1 Post-Doctoral Research Fellow post. Candidates with Ph.D. in Chemical Engineering and CFD research experience can apply via email application up to 30-05-2026 through the official website iith.ac.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Chemical Engineering, Extensive experience with Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) research

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Hyderabad Post-Doctoral Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
